home.bio: 8 years of C#/.NET development experience, specializing in high-concurrency backend system design and data processing optimization. Leveraging AI tools to enhance development efficiency and system stability.
home.card1Desc: 8 years of C#/.NET development, experienced in high-concurrency, high-availability architectures. Led a high-frequency trading system handling 120K records per run.
home.card2Desc: MySQL index strategy, table partitioning, Deadlock resolution, and Entity Framework ORM performance tuning.
home.card3Desc: Deployed distributed applications using ECS + S3 + RDS + CloudWatch. AWS SAA certified.
home.card4Desc: Built AI Agent projects and database knowledge bases, enabling teams to query system architecture in natural language.
